# YA Ace Media

> Boutique digital agency by Yosia. Builds lightning-fast Next.js websites and provides Local SEO services for service businesses in Israel and the United States.

YA Ace Media specializes in two markets:

- **Israel**: General web development and SEO for SMBs across all industries — real estate, e-commerce, restaurants, professional services, and trades.
- **United States**: Niche specialist for locksmiths, garage door companies, and home service contractors. Expertise in Google Business Profile (GBP) optimization, anti-spam GBP recovery, and Local SEO for trades that Google heavily moderates.

## Differentiators

- All websites built with Next.js for static-first performance
- PageSpeed Insights scores guaranteed at 95+ mobile or you don't pay
- Solo operator — clients work directly with the developer, no account managers
- Bilingual: native Hebrew and English content production
- Google Premier Partner

## Services

- Website development (Next.js, static export, Cloudflare/Vercel/Plesk hosting)
- Technical SEO and schema.org markup
- Local SEO and Google Business Profile optimization
- Google Ads and Meta paid advertising
- Conversion rate optimization
- Ongoing maintenance and monitoring

## Notable case studies

- Eagle Garage Door Services (eaglegaragedoorservices.com) — 72-page Next.js static site, US garage door
- Kamaaina Locksmith Honolulu (golocksmithhonolulu.com) — PSI 99/100/100/97, Hawaii locksmith
- Garage Door Kingdom (garagedoorkingdomllc.biz)
- Colorado Locksmith (colorado-locksmith.com)
- Colorado Dependable Locksmith (coloradodependablelocksmith.com)
- Hummus Ashkara (hummus-ashkara.co.il) — Israeli restaurant
- Limor Asay (limorasay.co.il) — personal brand
